---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<div style="padding:4rem 6vw;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <span class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:.5rem;">// praticiens</span>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.9rem,4vw,2.8rem);font-weight:800;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:.4rem 0 .6rem 0;">Les gens qui construisent</h1>
    <p style="color:var(--f-text-3);font-size:.88rem;margin:0 0 2rem 0;">Profils de praticiens tech — Data, DevOps, Cloud, IA, Cybersécurité, MLOps, Dev.</p>

    <input id="search-input" type="text" placeholder="Rechercher par nom, rôle, ville, stack…"
      oninput="renderPraticiens(getFiltered())"
      class="f-input" style="margin-bottom:1.25rem;"
    />

    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;">
      <button class="filter-pill active" onclick="filterPraticiens('all', this)">Tous</button>
      <button class="filter-pill" onclick="filterPraticiens('open', this)">● Disponibles</button>
      <button class="filter-pill" onclick="filterPraticiens('data', this)">Data</button>
      <button class="filter-pill" onclick="filterPraticiens('devops', this)">DevOps</button>
      <button class="filter-pill" onclick="filterPraticiens('cloud', this)">Cloud</button>
      <button class="filter-pill" onclick="filterPraticiens('ia', this)">IA</button>
      <button class="filter-pill" onclick="filterPraticiens('cybersecurite', this)">Cybersécurité</button>
      <button class="filter-pill" onclick="filterPraticiens('mlops', this)">MLOps</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="praticiens-grid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(290px,1fr));gap:1.25rem;"></div>
  <p id="no-results" style="display:none;color:var(--f-text-3);font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.85rem;margin-top:2rem;">Aucun praticien dans cette catégorie.</p>

</div>

<script>
const praticiens = [
  {
    slug:         "diakite",
    name:         "Diakité Mamadou Youssouf",
    role:         "Expert & Architecte Data",
    country:      "🇨🇮",
    city:         "Abidjan",
    stack:        ["Python", "Airflow", "dbt", "Spark", "GCP"],
    category:     "data",
    open_to_work: false,
    bio:          "Fondateur de from0tohero.dev. 1100+ apprenants formés en Data Engineering.",
    badges:       ["MENTOR", "SPEAKER", "OPEN SOURCE"]
  }
];

function renderPraticiens(list) {
  const grid = document.getElementById('praticiens-grid');
  const noRes = document.getElementById('no-results');
  if (!list.length) { grid.innerHTML = ''; noRes.style.display = 'block'; return; }
  noRes.style.display = 'none';

  const badges = {
    'MENTOR':      { color:'var(--f-orange)', border:'rgba(249,115,22,.25)', bg:'rgba(249,115,22,.08)' },
    'SPEAKER':     { color:'#a78bfa',         border:'rgba(167,139,250,.25)', bg:'rgba(167,139,250,.08)' },
    'OPEN SOURCE': { color:'var(--f-green)',   border:'rgba(52,211,153,.25)', bg:'rgba(52,211,153,.08)' },
    'CERTIFIÉ':    { color:'var(--f-sky)',      border:'var(--f-sky-border)',  bg:'var(--f-sky-bg)' }
  };

  grid.innerHTML = list.map(p => {
    const initials = p.name.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0,2).toUpperCase();
    return `
    <a href="${p.slug}.html" class="f-card-link">
      <div class="f-card f-card-hover" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.85rem;">

        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:1rem;">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.85rem;">
            <div class="profile-avatar" style="width:48px;height:48px;font-size:1rem;border-radius:10px;">${initials}</div>
            <div>
              <p style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:.98rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--f-text-1);margin:0;">${p.name}</p>
              <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;color:var(--f-sky);margin:.15rem 0 0 0;">${p.role}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <span style="font-size:1.1rem;flex-shrink:0;">${p.country}</span>
        </div>

        ${p.badges?.length ? `
        <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem;">
          ${p.badges.map(b => {
            const c = badges[b] || { color:'var(--f-text-3)', border:'var(--f-border)', bg:'var(--f-surface)' };
            return `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:${c.color};border:1px solid ${c.border};background:${c.bg};padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;">${b}</span>`;
          }).join('')}
        </div>` : ''}

        <p style="font-size:.83rem;color:var(--f-text-2);line-height:1.7;margin:0;">${p.bio}</p>

        <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem;">
          ${p.stack.map(s => `<span class="f-tag">${s}</span>`).join('')}
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;color:var(--f-text-3);">${p.city}</span>
          ${p.open_to_work
            ? `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;color:var(--f-green);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;"><span style="width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--f-green);border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;"></span>disponible</span>`
            : `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;color:var(--f-border-2);">○ non dispo</span>`
          }
        </div>

      </div>
    </a>`;
  }).join('');
}

let activeFilter = 'all';

function getFiltered() {
  const q = (document.getElementById('search-input')?.value || '').toLowerCase();
  let list = praticiens;
  if (activeFilter === 'open') list = list.filter(p => p.open_to_work);
  else if (activeFilter !== 'all') list = list.filter(p => p.category === activeFilter);
  if (q) list = list.filter(p =>
    p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    p.role.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    p.city.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    p.stack.join(' ').toLowerCase().includes(q)
  );
  return list;
}

function filterPraticiens(filter, btn) {
  activeFilter = filter;
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-pill').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  renderPraticiens(getFiltered());
}

renderPraticiens(praticiens);
</script>
```
